program_en: B.Sc. in Learning Design and Technology
program_chi: 學習設計與科技理學士
learning_outcomes:
LDTEN 1. Major Programme:
The programme aims to equip
students with multi-disciplinary knowledge in education, technology and
science, as well as essential skills and competencies for a variety of roles
in the fast-changing, information- rich world.
Upon completion of the
programme, students will have:
·  |  mastered the latest theoretical
underpinnings of learning design and the foundational know-how of the
cutting-edge learning technology; (K)
·  |  gained inspirational insights
into design, implementation and evaluation of technology-supported
learning;(K/S)
·  |  demonstrated competent
technological and pedagogical skills to take on challenges in a rapidly
changing world; (S)
·  |  acquired a critical and
creative mind to approach real-world problems with original and innovative
solutions; (K/S)
·  |  investigated issues from
multiple perspectives through engaging in transformative learning
opportunities, such as self-directed/collaborative research studies,
educational/technological internships, authentic community-based service
learning and organizational leaderships; (K/S/V) and
·  |  developed the essential mindset
and skillset that foster technological innovation and excellence in the field
of education or other related areas. (K/S/V)
K = Knowledge outcomes
S = Skills outcomes
V = Values and attitude
outcomes

Learning Design and Technology Learning Design and Technology Applicable to students admitted in 2025-26

Students

Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  AIST, CSCI, EDUC, ELEG, ENGG, LDTE,
LSCI, MAEG, PHYS, SEEM and STAT courses at 2000 and above level as
included in the Major Programme Requirement will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification.
